title: More Nonsense Limerick 74
content:
There was an old person of Rimini,
    Who said, "Gracious! Goodness! O Gimini!"
    When they said, "Please be still!" 
    She ran down a hill,
    And was never more heard of at Rimini.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 74", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
